title: Economy and Shops
description: You can withdraw and deposit bank notes now and buy items in shops!
body:
# Economy
## - Minecraft 1.21.7 Datapack -

This Datapack allows Players to use ATMs and hold currency as
items. They can trade with them or use them in shops.

Add the tag "admin" to yourself to edit the Shops and ATMs.
By left and right clicking you can change the amount and by shift clicking the shop you can set it to your hand item.
It cant sell items with enchantments or other custom attributes.

Type the command /trigger show_money to toggle the
actionbar title for your current Balance.

You can craft a 1$ Bill by using a Experience Bottle and a Paper.

Drop two Banknotes to combine them into one.


### To summon an ATM use the following Command in a repeating Commandblock:
execute positioned ~ ~0.5 ~ unless entity @n[type=minecraft:interaction,tag=currency_atm,distance=..0.3] run summon minecraft:interaction ~ ~ ~ {Tags:["currency_atm"],response:1b,height:0.99f,width:0.99f}

### To summon a Shop use this Command in a repeating Commandblock:
execute positioned ~ ~0.5 ~ unless entity @n[type=minecraft:interaction,tag=currency_shop,distance=..0.3] run summon minecraft:interaction ~ ~ ~ {Tags:["currency_shop"],response:1b,height:0.99f,width:0.99f}
